Diso

System / Location · First seen 3301-05-08 · 19 mentions
EDSM ↗ Inara ↗
Active: 3301-05-08 → 3307-01-19
System Overview

First mentioned: 3301-05-08
Last mentioned: 3307-01-19
Total mentions: 18

Related

  • [[Lave]] (6 co-mentions)
  • [[Orerve]] (6 co-mentions)
  • [[Interstellar Association for Agriculture]] (5 co-mentions)
  • [[Alliance]] (4 co-mentions)
  • [[Lave Radio Network]] (4 co-mentions)

Description

Diso is a storied agricultural system in the Alliance's Old Worlds, renowned throughout the galaxy for its distinctive Diso Ma Corn. The crop's unique psychoactive dust coating can only be cultivated cost-effectively on Birmingham, where the planet's soil chemistry and constant solar wave bombardment from the parent star create ideal conditions. In 3301, the Green Party of Diso spearheaded a highly successful rejuvenation project that saw thousands of pilots deliver over 15 million tonnes of machinery in just 65 hours to expand Ma Corn production.

The system is also the political home of Prime Minister Edmund Mahon, who launched his historic re-election campaign from Birmingham in 3307. Diso's agricultural importance made it a focal point during the 3305 blight crisis, when the Interstellar Association for Agriculture identified poor harvests there that were later linked to contaminated Rockforth fertiliser. The system's primary trade hub, Shifnalport, has long served as a gateway for the Old Worlds economy.

System Data
Coordinates: [72.15625, 48.75, 70.75]
Allegiance: Alliance
Government: Cooperative
Controlling Faction: Alliance Rapid-reaction Corps
Security: Medium
Economy: Extraction
Population: 4.1B

Mentions Timeline (19 articles)
3307-01-19
Prime Minister Mahon Campaigns for Re-Election
Edmund Mahon has launched a political campaign to be elected As the Alliance’s leader for a second term.
3305-10-31
Blight Pathogen Cured
The agronomic treatment proves effective against the blight pathogen. Farming communities in Diso and Orerve begin recovering. Mass production of the treatment begins for galaxy-wide distribution.
3305-10-28
Scythe of Panem Militants Defeated
Scythe of Panem militants are defeated in the Quator system. Bruthanvan Co security teams and independent pilots neutralise the group's ringleaders. An underground facility beneath Weber Settlement yields arrest evidence.
3305-10-24
Anti Blight Treatment Discovered
The IAA, Rockforth, Vandermeer and Neomedical develop an agronomic treatment that reverses the blight's effects. Traders are asked to distribute the treatment to Diso and Orerve as priority agricultural centres.
3305-10-16
Initiative to Eradicate Rockforth Fertiliser
The IAA confirms Rockforth's EX7 fertiliser is linked to the blight. An initiative launches to collect and safely dispose of the contaminated fertiliser from markets across multiple systems.
3305-10-10
Initiative to Counter Poor Harvests
Coordinated trade initiatives launch in Diso and Orerve to mitigate crop yield losses. The IAA suspects a new form of blight is responsible for rapid crop degeneration. Traders deliver pesticides, synthetic reagents and grain.
3305-09-13
Agricultural Industry Predicts Low Harvest
The IAA announces below-average crop yields in key agricultural systems including Diso and Orerve. An investigation is launched to identify causes. Synthetic treatments are proposed to enhance fertility.
3305-09-06
Alliance Festival of Culture Celebrates Finale
The Alliance Festival of Culture concludes with a week-long food and drink celebration in Birmingham, Diso. Prime Minister Mahon thanks participants and invites artists across the galaxy to make the Alliance their home.
3305-08-31
The Winking Cat’s Return
The notorious art thief Winking Cat resurfaces during the Alliance Festival of Culture in Alioth, returning the long-lost masterpiece 'Penance Street' by Megan Madigan. The artwork vanished in transit 60 years ago.
3305-03-09
Disowned Heiress Admits Gambling Addiction
Disowned heiress Talitha Ambrose publicly admits to losing her family's entire fortune through gambling addiction, stating she feels liberated by poverty and plans to raise funds for addiction support charities.
3305-02-23
Heiress's Gambling Connections Revealed
Journalist Flint 'Firemaker' Lafosse reveals Lady Talitha Ambrose's long-standing association with the exclusive Jokers' Deck gambling circle, suggesting she may have gambled away the Ambrose fortune rather than being kidnapped.
3304-06-15
Lave Radio Network Campaign Concludes
The Lave Radio Network announces its campaign reached a successful conclusion. Scores of pilots delivered commodities to Lave Station, allowing the network to broadcast its annual conference across the galaxy. The rival Lave Jet Family campaign was unable to destabilise the initiative.
3304-06-14
Lave Radio Network Campaign Concludes
The Lave Radio Network announces its campaign reached a successful conclusion. Scores of pilots delivered commodities to Lave Station, allowing the network to broadcast its annual conference across the galaxy. The rival Lave Jet Family campaign was unable to destabilise the initiative despite also receiving pilot support.
3304-06-10
Week in Review
Weekly summary covering the murder of INRA descendant Luca Hem by the League of Reparation, Aisling Duval hosting Jordan Rochester and Caspian Leopold's subsequent visit, the Lave Radio Network vs Lave Jet Family rivalry, successful conclusions of two starport repair initiatives, and the theft of the Youscape artwork from Garden City Gallery.
3304-06-08
Conflict in Lave
The Lave Radio Network announces plans to broadcast its annual conference from the Diso system and places an open order for commodities to be delivered to Lave Station. The Lave Jet Family responds with a rival campaign to construct a signal jammer to block the broadcast. Both factions set week-long operations to achieve their aims.
3303-11-17
Community Goal Breakfast at Tranquillity
The Guardians of Tranquillity have announced plans to host a food festival in the Tarach Tor system, prompting criticism from Independent Leesti for Equality, which is coordinating a similar event in Leesti. The Guardians denied the event is an attempt to upstage their rivals. Spokesperson General Hunter O'Brien stated the festival will showcase regional cuisine and libations from Tarach Tor's vineyards and breweries.
3302-03-03
Community Goal Lave Radio Appeals for Blood Crystals
The Lave Radio Network launches a campaign to construct a new interstellar transmitter relay in the Diso system after discovering their existing transmitter was broken and scavenged. They need rare blood crystals from the Cherbones system for the new equipment.
3301-05-11
The Alliance Supports Five a Day in Diso!
The Green Party of Diso's rejuvenation project for Birmingham succeeded spectacularly when 5,187 commanders delivered over 15 million tonnes of machinery in just 65 hours. Top contributors included Broker Mrozak, Broker HawX, Tycoon Ace Rimzy, Tycoon Thalios Abraxas and Broker Del Boy. An increased supply of Diso Ma Corn has been released to markets aboard Shifnalport to stimulate the Old World sector economy.
3301-05-08
Old World Resurgence in Diso
The Green Party of Diso announced a rejuvenation project to increase production of Diso Ma Corn, a unique cash crop grown only on Birmingham due to the planet's special soil nutrients and solar wave bombardment. The party placed orders for 15 million tonnes of machinery including Atmospheric Processors, Crop Harvesters, Power Generators and Water Purifiers. Pilots must sign up as active participants before selling machinery to earn personal bonuses.
